Suryakumar Yadav Faces Pressure Amid Poor T20I Form

Dec 13, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Suryakumar Yadav Faces Pressure Amid Poor T20I Form

Suryakumar Yadav is under scrutiny after failing to score a T20I fifty in his last 20 innings. The India T20I captain has accumulated only 227 runs since November last year, averaging 13.35.

His struggles continued during India’s ongoing five-match home series against South Africa, scoring 12 and 5 in the first two games. Former India batter Aakash Chopra has emphasized the need for Yadav to regain form ahead of the T20 World Cup 2026.

Key Points

  • Yadav has not scored a T20I fifty in his last 20 innings
  • Total runs since November last year: 227, with an average of 13.35
  • Poor scores of 12 and 5 in the first two games of the South Africa series
  • Former cricketers stress the importance of form recovery before T20 World Cup 2026
